ChatGPT vs Jasper (2026): Which Should You Use?

ChatGPT and Jasper are both popular tools in the AI Writing Tools space. Here's how they compare.

ChatGPTJasper
MakerOpenAIJasper AI
PricingFree plan available; Plus $20/mo; Pro $200/moPlans start around $49/mo; no permanent free tier (free trial only)
Free tierYesNo
Best forGeneral-purpose assistant for writing, brainstorming, coding, and quick research.Marketing teams needing on-brand copy at scale.
